name: Timesheet
description: A single member's time entries and live running timer.

global.schema:
type TimesheetState {
  ownerAddress: String
  entries: [TimeEntry!]!
  running: RunningEntry
}

type TimeEntry {
  id: OID!
  description: String!
  projectId: OID
  start: DateTime!
  end: DateTime!
  billable: Boolean!
  tags: [String!]!
}

type RunningEntry {
  id: OID!
  description: String!
  projectId: OID
  start: DateTime!
  billable: Boolean!
  tags: [String!]!
}

modules.name: tracking
modules.description: Time entry tracking and the live timer.

operations.name: START_TIMER
operations.schema:
input StartTimerInput {
  id: OID!
  description: String!
  projectId: OID
  start: DateTime!
  billable: Boolean!
  tags: [String!]!
}

errors.name: TimerAlreadyRunningError
errors.description: A timer is already running for this timesheet.

operations.name: STOP_TIMER

errors.name: NoRunningTimerError
errors.description: There is no running timer to stop.

errors.name: InvalidTimeRangeError
errors.description: The end time must not be before the start time.

operations.name: DISCARD_TIMER

errors.name: NoRunningTimerError
errors.description: There is no running timer to discard.

operations.name: ADD_ENTRY
operations.schema:
input AddEntryInput {
  id: OID!
  description: String!
  projectId: OID
  start: DateTime!
  end: DateTime!
  billable: Boolean!
  tags: [String!]!
}

errors.name: DuplicateEntryIdError
errors.description: An entry with this id already exists.

errors.name: InvalidTimeRangeError
errors.description: The end time must not be before the start time.

operations.name: UPDATE_ENTRY
operations.schema:
input UpdateEntryInput {
  id: OID!
  description: String
  projectId: OID
  start: DateTime
  end: DateTime
  billable: Boolean
  tags: [String!]
}

errors.name: EntryNotFoundError
errors.description: No entry with this id exists.

errors.name: InvalidTimeRangeError
errors.description: The end time must not be before the start time.

operations.name: DELETE_ENTRY

errors.name: EntryNotFoundError
errors.description: No entry with this id exists.
